title: cyperus umbellatus
intro: Cyperus umbellatus, also known as umbrella sedge, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Cyperus umbellatus include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, Cyperus umbellatus is often used as a dried herb or made into a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
